title: INIT-1.3.1 — Machine-Readable Invariant Registry Substrate
phase_description: Additive scaffolding — registry JSON, id-ledger, source-manifest, loader, contracts type, CI gate

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Last substantive commit — proof-binding-validator.ts, proof.md, workflow binding step

pnpm_verify.note: lint + type-check + build + test all green in worktree (re-verified on 7ece212e)

invariant_registry_gate.note: Gate validates: closed-schema, ledger allocation, source-manifest bidirectional coverage, append-only ledger (deletion + mutation), fresh ratification binding, mechanical enforcement. Local run: exit 0.

findings_addressed: F1: pnpm version corrected to 10.29.3; fetch-depth: 0 added
F2: closed-schema validation — unknown fields in registry/ledger/manifest cause gate to fail
F3: source-manifest bidirectional coverage — every registry ID must have a manifest entry and vice versa
F4: append-only ledger — IDs cannot be deleted OR have immutable fields (title, allocated_at) mutated
F5: fresh ratification binding — when registry/ledger content changes vs base, ratification_ref + ratified_at must also change
F7: this proof artifact, schema_version 2 with sha_binding block
